title: Family Dinner Takeout
headline: Feed the whole family — fried fish and chicken to go
body: Grab a family-size spread of fried catfish, chicken, and Southern sides to take home. Everything is made fresh to order, so call ahead at (319) 221-1040 and it's hot when you arrive.

faqs.question: Can I order a family-size meal to go?
faqs.answer: Yes — Captains is counter-service and takeout-first. Call ahead at (319) 221-1040 and your order is ready hot when you arrive.

faqs.question: What's the most popular dish for families?
faqs.answer: The fried catfish is our most-ordered item; fried chicken and wings are close behind.

faqs.question: Do you take reservations?
faqs.answer: No — Captains is a counter-service spot. There is a dining room at the storefront, but most orders go out. Call ahead for faster pickup.

faqs.question: Is everything made to order?
faqs.answer: Yes — fish and chicken are breaded and fried fresh when you order, so calling ahead speeds up pickup.

faqs.question: What are your hours?
faqs.answer: Mon–Thu 11am–10pm, Fri–Sat 11am–11pm, and Sun 11am–8pm.

seo.title: Family Dinner Takeout — Captains Fish and Chicken
seo.description: Family-size fried catfish, chicken, and Southern sides to go in Cedar Rapids. Made fresh to order — call ahead.

title: Friday Fish Fry
headline: Friday fish fry, fried to order
body: Make Friday a fish-fry night with cornmeal-breaded catfish, perch, and cod, fried fresh to order. Open until 11pm on Fridays.

faqs.question: What fish do you fry?
faqs.answer: Catfish, perch, tilapia, cod, and shrimp — all breaded and fried to order.

faqs.question: How late are you open on Fridays?
faqs.answer: Until 11pm on Friday and Saturday.

faqs.question: Which fish is most popular?
faqs.answer: The fried catfish is our most-ordered item.

faqs.question: Should I call ahead?
faqs.answer: Yes — everything is fried to order, so a call ahead at (319) 221-1040 means it's ready hot when you arrive.

faqs.question: How is the fish prepared?
faqs.answer: Cornmeal breading with fresh-ground lemon pepper, fried fresh to order.

seo.title: Friday Fish Fry — Captains Fish and Chicken
seo.description: Cornmeal-breaded catfish, perch, and cod fried to order for your Friday fish fry in Cedar Rapids. Open late Fridays.

title: Game-Day Wings
headline: Wings for game day
body: Bone-in and boneless wings, fried to order, plus sides like cheese curds and fries. Call ahead for a bigger order.

faqs.question: Do you have bone-in and boneless wings?
faqs.answer: Yes — both, breaded and fried to order.

faqs.question: Can I place a large wing order?
faqs.answer: Yes — call ahead at (319) 221-1040 so a bigger order is ready when you arrive.

faqs.question: What sides go with wings?
faqs.answer: Cheese curds, fries, onion rings, and hush puppies are popular pairings.

faqs.question: Are the wings made to order?
faqs.answer: Yes — fried fresh when you order.

faqs.question: How late can I grab wings?
faqs.answer: Until 10pm Mon–Thu, 11pm Fri–Sat, and 8pm Sunday.

seo.title: Game-Day Wings — Captains Fish and Chicken
seo.description: Bone-in and boneless wings fried to order for game day in Cedar Rapids, plus cheese curds and fries. Call ahead.

title: Quick Lunch
headline: A fast fried-fish or chicken lunch
body: Counter-service lunch on the 1st Ave NE side — catfish, tenders, and sides, made to order. Call ahead to skip the wait.

faqs.question: Is lunch quick if I call ahead?
faqs.answer: Yes — call (319) 221-1040 and your order is ready for pickup when you arrive.

faqs.question: What's good for a fast lunch?
faqs.answer: Fried catfish or chicken tenders with a side.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: 1616 1st Ave NE, on the northeast side of Cedar Rapids, with onsite parking.

faqs.question: Are you open for lunch every day?
faqs.answer: Yes — daily from 11am.

faqs.question: Is it made to order?
faqs.answer: Yes — fried fresh when you order, so call ahead for the fastest pickup.

seo.title: Quick Lunch — Captains Fish and Chicken
seo.description: A fast counter-service lunch of fried catfish or chicken tenders in northeast Cedar Rapids. Call ahead to skip the wait.

title: Open Late
headline: Fried fish and chicken, open late
body: Captains is open late — until 10pm Monday through Thursday and 11pm Friday and Saturday. Wings, catfish, and shrimp, fried to order.

faqs.question: How late are you open?
faqs.answer: Until 10pm Monday through Thursday, 11pm Friday and Saturday, and 8pm on Sunday.

faqs.question: What can I order later in the evening?
faqs.answer: Wings, fried catfish, shrimp, and Southern sides — all made to order.

faqs.question: Should I call ahead in the evening?
faqs.answer: Yes — call (319) 221-1040 so your order is ready when you arrive.

faqs.question: Do you deliver at night?
faqs.answer: Delivery is available through the major apps during open hours.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: 1616 1st Ave NE, northeast Cedar Rapids, with onsite parking.

seo.title: Open Late — Captains Fish and Chicken
seo.description: Fried fish and chicken open late in Cedar Rapids — until 10pm Mon–Thu and 11pm Fri–Sat. Wings, catfish, and shrimp made to order.

title: Weekend Dinner
headline: Weekend fried seafood and chicken
body: Weekend dinner to go — seafood baskets, fried chicken, and Southern sides. Open until 11pm Friday and Saturday.

faqs.question: What's good for a weekend dinner?
faqs.answer: A seafood basket or fried chicken with Southern sides.

faqs.question: How late are you open on weekends?
faqs.answer: Until 11pm Friday and Saturday, and 8pm on Sunday.

faqs.question: Can I get a mix of seafood?
faqs.answer: Yes — the seafood basket combines our fried seafood.

faqs.question: Is it made to order?
faqs.answer: Yes — fried fresh when you order; call ahead for faster pickup.

faqs.question: Do you take reservations for the weekend?
faqs.answer: No — Captains is counter-service and takeout-first. Call ahead at (319) 221-1040.

seo.title: Weekend Dinner — Captains Fish and Chicken
seo.description: Weekend fried seafood baskets and chicken to go in Cedar Rapids. Open until 11pm Friday and Saturday. Made to order.
